mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (circle_id, user_id, content, parent_id, like_count, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{circleId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{parentId}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.name, u.avatar FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
SELECT c.*, u.name, u.avatar FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.circle_id = #{circleId} ORDER BY c.create_time ASC
SELECT c.*, u.name, u.avatar FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY c.create_time ASC
